rationale: The proposed change to the homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §25.085, which governs compulsory school attendance requirements for students.
quote: A child who is required to attend school under this section shall attend school each school day for the entire period the program of instruction is provided.
_note: No conflict. The cited rule concerns compulsory school attendance and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
